Wolf Freedom of Religion or Belief Victims List Country Profiles Defending Freedoms Project Publications " class="we-megamenu-nolink"> Annual Reports Contact Us Facebook Twitter YouTube Instagram Search Afghanistan ANNUAL REPORT: AFGHANISTAN CHAPTERS Recent News Events Publications Advising Government Religious freedom conditions in Afghanistan are dire as the Taliban enforces a strict interpretation of Sunni Islam. Authorities use religious edicts to crack down on all Afghans who express dissent or different views of Islam, including women and religious minorities. Ongoing attacks by the Islamic State Khorasan Province (ISIS-K) also pose an ongoing threat to Shi’a Muslims in particular.
